title: hebe astonii
intro: Hebe astonii, also known as Hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Hebe astonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hebe astonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
